live_mode_blocked_reason: Account too small for round-trip commissions; long-only intraday in TFSA risks CRA business-income reclassification. Requires non-registered margin account + cheaper broker (e.g. IBKR Lite) before going live.

strategy.name: Opening Range Breakout (5-minute) — long-only
sources: Toby Crabel — Day Trading with Short-Term Price Patterns and Opening Range Breakout (1990)
Carlo Zarattini, Andrew Aziz — Can Day Trading Really Be Profitable? (SSRN, 2023)
strategy.description: Wait for the first 5 minutes after the US market opens (9:30–9:35 ET). Mark that bar's high and low — that's the Opening Range. If price breaks above the OR high during the rest of the day, enter long. Stop at the OR low. Target at OR high + 2 × OR range (2R). Force-close any open position 15 minutes before market close (3:45 ET). Long-only — short signals are ignored. Stop placing new entries after 2 losses on the same day.

indicators.or_high: High of the 9:30–9:35 ET 5-minute candle. Computed once per day per symbol.
indicators.or_low: Low of the 9:30–9:35 ET 5-minute candle. Computed once per day per symbol.
indicators.or_range: or_high − or_low. This is 1R, the unit of risk.

bullish: Price has broken above the 5-minute OR high

long: It is between 9:35 and 15:30 ET (we want at least 15 minutes before force-close)
Price has crossed above the 5-minute OR high in the current minute
We do not currently hold a position in this symbol
We have not already entered this symbol today
Daily circuit breaker has not tripped (fewer than 2 losses today across all symbols)

exit_rules: Hard stop: OR low (1R loss). Logged as a loss.
Take profit: OR high + 2 × (OR high − OR low). 2R win.
Time stop: 15:45 ET — force-close any open position at the current price.
risk_rules: Long-only — TFSA cannot short, also matches the strategy's published edge
Max 1 entry per symbol per day
Max 2 losing trades per day — circuit breaker stops new entries (open positions still play out to their stop or target)
Position size: spend MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD or fewer dollars; round down to whole shares; respect PORTFOLIO_VALUE_USD
Skip days with US market holidays
PAPER MODE ONLY for now — live execution is disabled by `live_mode_blocked: true` above
notes: Long-only ORB on liquid US ETFs. Expect ~1.5 setups/day on average across SPY/QQQ/IWM (long-only halves the signal count vs long+short). Win rate historically 40–50%; with 2R targets, expectancy is positive in studies but ANY individual day can lose. The 2-loss circuit breaker is the most important rule — it caps daily drawdown.
